mapper.sql: id, order_no, member_id, member_name, member_mobile, product_id, product_name, product_type_id, product_type_name, service_type, store_id, lesson_count, duration_minutes, validity_days, original_amount, payable_amount, paid_amount, refund_amount, discount_amount, marketing_type, marketing_activity_id, marketing_activity_name, coupon_id, member_coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_discount_amount, pay_method, pay_status, order_status, paid_at, settled_at, cancel_at, refund_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pt_private_order WHERE id = #{value} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM pt_private_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_private_order (order_no, member_id, member_name, member_mobile, product_id, product_name, product_type_id, product_type_name, service_type, store_id, lesson_count, duration_minutes, validity_days, original_amount, payable_amount, paid_amount, refund_amount, discount_amount, marketing_type, marketing_activity_id, marketing_activity_name, coupon_id, member_coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_discount_amount, pay_method, pay_status, order_status, created_by) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{memberMobile}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productTypeId}, #{productTypeName}, #{serviceType}, #{storeId}, #{lessonCount}, #{durationMinutes}, #{validityDays}, #{originalAmount}, #{payableAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{refundAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{marketingType}, #{marketingActivityId}, #{marketingActivityName}, #{couponId}, #{memberCouponId}, #{couponName}, #{couponDiscountAmount}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pt_private_order WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND order_status IN (0, 1, 2) AND deleted = 0

SELECT p.id, p.product_name, p.product_type_id, (SELECT type_name FROM pt_product_type WHERE id = p.product_type_id) AS typeName, p.service_type, p.original_price, p.sale_price, p.member_price, p.new_user_price, p.lesson_count, p.duration_minutes, p.validity_days, p.purchase_limit, p.sale_stock, p.sold_count FROM pt_product p WHERE p.id = #{productId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.listing_status = 1 AND (p.unlisting_at IS NULL OR p.unlisting_at > NOW())

SELECT id, activity_name AS activityName, product_id AS productId, group_buy_price AS activityPrice, activity_stock AS activityStock, sold_count AS soldCount, purchase_limit AS purchaseLimit FROM mk_group_buy_activity WHERE id = #{activityId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW()

SELECT id, activity_name AS activityName, product_id AS productId, flash_sale_price AS activityPrice, activity_stock AS activityStock, sold_count AS soldCount, purchase_limit AS purchaseLimit FROM mk_flash_sale_activity WHERE id = #{activityId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW()
SELECT FROM pt_private_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_private_order SET pay_status = 2, order_status = 2, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, paid_at = NOW(), settled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = 0
UPDATE pt_product SET sold_count = sold_count + 1 WHERE id = #{productId} AND (sale_stock IS NULL OR sold_count < sale_stock)
UPDATE mk_group_buy_activity SET sold_count = sold_count + 1 WHERE id = #{activityId} AND (activity_stock IS NULL OR sold_count < activity_stock)
UPDATE mk_flash_sale_activity SET sold_count = sold_count + 1 WHERE id = #{activityId} AND sold_count < activity_stock
mapper.select: SELECT gift_count AS giftCount, validity_days AS validityDays, scope_type AS scopeType FROM pt_product_group_benefit WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_enabled = 1 AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_member_group_benefit (member_id, source_order_id, source_product_id, gift_count, used_count, remaining_count, effective_time, expire_time, status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{giftCount}, 0, #{giftCount}, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{validityDays} DAY), 1)
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM pt_member_group_benefit WHERE source_order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_member_group_benefit_flow (benefit_id, member_id, flow_type, change_count, before_count, after_count, biz_type, biz_id) VALUES (#{benefitId}, #{memberId}, 1, #{giftCount}, 0, #{giftCount}, 1, #{orderId})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pt_private_order WHERE member_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
AND order_status = #{orderStatus}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pt_private_order WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM pt_private_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM pt_private_order WHERE order_status = 0 AND deleted = 0 AND created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE)
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_private_order SET order_status = 3, cancel_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = 0 AND deleted = 0

UPDATE pt_private_order SET refund_amount = #{newRefundAmount}, refund_at = NOW(), order_status = #{orderStatus}, pay_status = #{payStatus}, updated_by = #{operatorId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 AND order_status IN (1, 2) AND refund_amount = #{oldRefundAmount}
UPDATE pt_private_order SET pay_status = 1, order_status = 1, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, paid_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = 0
UPDATE pt_private_order SET pay_status = 2, order_status = 2, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, settled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status = 1
